title: huperzia × buttersii
intro: Huperzia × buttersii, a rare and unique plant, is a hybrid species of club moss (Huperzia) found in the southeastern United States. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of huperzine A, a naturally occurring alkaloid with neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Huperzia × buttersii include improved cognitive function, enhanced memory, and potential anti-aging effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements. Huperzia × buttersii is often prepared as a standardized extract or capsule, and can also be found in tea and tincture form, although its availability and usage may vary due to conservation efforts and regulations.
